entry.title: New: Bill 88, FD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH THE STATE OF HAWAIʻI FOR USE OF HALE ʻO LĀʻIE FOR TEMPORARY HOUSING FOR SURVIVORS OF THE AUGUST 2023 MAUI WILDFIRES THROUGH THE HAWAIʻI INTERIM HOUSING PROGRAM"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
